title: Approved Change — ECR-216: Payload gimbal redesign
text:
Engineering Change Notice ECN-313. Implements ECR-216.
Approved by: Felix Herrera, 2024-07-02.

Authorised changes:
1. P-1154 (Camera Gimbal Assembly): Updated to Rev C. New CFRP frame design, natural frequency 24Hz. 3-axis (pitch/roll/yaw) vs previous 2-axis.
2. P-1155 (Gimbal Motor Pitch), P-1156 (Roll), P-1157 (Yaw): Updated to GB-Systems hollow-shaft BLDC.
3. P-1158 (Gimbal Controller Board): Updated to SimpleBGC 32-bit extended with onboard IMU.
4. DOC-449 (Payload System ICD): Updated for P-1154 Rev C and P-1158 interface. 3-axis specification included.
5. SRC-021 (gimbal_driver.py): Updated for P-1158 SimpleBGC 32-bit serial protocol. Cass Doyle, committed 2024-07-31.
6. DRW-519 (Gimbal Mount Detail): Updated for new frame geometry.
7. Qualification: Flight test completed 2024-08-22. Jitter ±0.09° (requirement ±0.5°) — PASS. Test report appended to DOC-449.
